Dear [Customer Name],

We are writing to confirm your recent account activity and ensure the accuracy of your personal and financial information.

As part of our ongoing commitment to security, we are requesting you to verify your account details to prevent any unauthorized access or changes to your account.

Please take a moment to confirm your information by clicking the link below:

[Verify Your Account Details]

This is a one-time verification step, and it's important that you complete it to maintain the security of your account.

If you did not initiate this request, please contact our customer support team immediately at [support email] or call us at [phone number] to report this and ensure your account is protected.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,  
[Bank Name]  
Customer Support Team  
[Bank Logo]  
[Bank Website URL]

---

**P.S.** If you are unsure about this request, please do not hesitate to reach out. Your security is our priority.

---
